# WODIQ

WODIQ is an AI workout planner for choosing what to train today. The marketing and legal website is published at https://wodiq.nl, while the product app is hosted at https://wodiq.app.

## Key Pages

- [Dutch homepage](https://wodiq.nl/)
- [English homepage](https://wodiq.nl/en/)
- [Privacy policy](https://wodiq.nl/privacy/)
- [English privacy policy](https://wodiq.nl/en/privacy/)
- [Terms](https://wodiq.nl/terms/)
- [English terms](https://wodiq.nl/en/terms/)
- [TestFlight pilot](https://testflight.apple.com/join/VHNX9gkJ)
